adopted_by: PI (user) — 'Me encantan las enmiendas. ejecutalas y guardalas.'

applies_to: U1/S1b risk-envelope screen contract (not yet frozen)
U2 endogenous-timing oracle contract (not yet frozen)
U3/U4 hybrid training contracts (not yet frozen)
U5 virgin confirmation contract (not yet frozen)

amendment_1_graded_u5_outcome.problem: U5 primary gates are superiority-only (LCB95[V(Hybrid)-V(BestClassical)] >= 0.01). The historically most probable good outcome — hybrid TOST-equivalent to best classical in ReT WITH worst-product-fill safety restored (exactly what Program Q's pure learner failed) — would map to STOP and burn the campaign. This reconstructs the compound-gate failure mode the paper itself documents twice as a paid-for lesson.
amendment_1_graded_u5_outcome.rule: U5 MUST adjudicate to one of a graded outcome set that includes, in addition to the superiority PASS, the following second positive terminal:

new_terminal_outcome.label: PASS_HYBRID_SAFE_EQUIVALENT

gates_all_required.equivalence_vs_best_classical: simultaneous CI95[V(Hybrid)-V(BestClassical)] wholly inside [-0.01, +0.01] in every promoted cell (TOST; two one-sided bounds, never inferred from non-significance)
gates_all_required.worst_product_fill_recovered: simultaneous LCB95[worst_product_fill(Hybrid) - worst_product_fill(BestClassical)] >= -0.02 in every promoted cell (the exact guardrail Program Q failed)
gates_all_required.class_b_integrity: all Class-B gates unchanged from the plan: exact resources, review-rights equality, lost-demand non-increase, feedback/replacement placebos, direct-DES replay audit

new_terminal_outcome.claim_licensed: The hybrid recovers deployable worst-product safety at classical-equivalent canonical resilience and amortized online cost — 'recovering what Q lost' — publishable as a primary result.
new_terminal_outcome.claim_forbidden: Any superiority claim over the best classical controller under this outcome.

amendment_1_graded_u5_outcome.freeze_requirement: This outcome set must be in the U5 contract BEFORE any U5 seed is opened; adding it after seeing U5 data is prohibited.

amendment_2_compute_preflight_and_tripwi.problem: T0->U1->U2 has unbounded-duration risk (S1 died at 48% after 3 days; war-stress atlas died STOP_COMPUTE_INFEASIBLE at 86.5M episodes). A fallback that exists but never fires is the most expensive way to lose a finished asset (the executed Program Q manuscript).

compute_preflight_gate.binding: REQUIRED before freezing EVERY upcoming contract (U1/S1b, U2, U3/U4, U5).
required_fields: measured_seconds_per_episode on the actual target hardware (measured, not estimated)
total_episode_count implied by the frozen design (worst case, no early-exit credit)
hardware_capacity_cap (VPS ovh-agent-lab / Kaggle / local M1) and margin
compute_preflight_gate.pass_rule: projected_wall_clock <= 0.5 * time_to_tripwire AND projected_peak_memory within capacity. FAIL -> redesign before freeze; a contract frozen without a passing preflight artifact is invalid.
compute_preflight_gate.artifact: compute_preflight.json committed next to the contract, hash-referenced by it.

tripwire.condition: U2 endogenous-timing oracle has no PASS (LCB95(H_timing) >= 0.015) by this date
action: The executed Program Q manuscript (branch paper2-program-q-integration) is submitted as Paper 2 with its truthful claim (learned adaptation replicated over the complete open-loop frontier; TOST equivalence to belief-MPC; no neural premium; worst-product safety not certified).
The hybrid campaign continues uninterrupted as the NEXT paper; nothing is cancelled, only the publication routing changes.
tripwire.adjustment_rule: Date adjustable by the PI in writing BEFORE the U1 freeze; absent written adjustment it is binding. Set as ~2x the historical program cadence (days-scale runs) with margin.

amendment_3_garrido_source_attribution.problem: The plan cites 'Garrido' for three distinct sources; conflating them is the kind of imprecision a reviewer who knows the author detects immediately — and Garrido may be a reviewer.
amendment_3_garrido_source_attribution.rule: The manuscript's Garrido-alignment matrix MUST attribute every inherited element to exactly one of:

sources.garrido_rios_2017_thesis: Physics and fidelity base: Op1-Op13, risk taxonomy R11-R24/R3, cap-60 backorder list, warm-up semantics, Annex B request-snapshot support, Table 6.12, the 0/47,546 formula-cell verification against the original workbooks.
sources.garrido_et_al_2024: Closed-loop motivation (turning open-loop DES output into updated decisions) and the Cobb-Douglas index ReT_garrido2024 — which under this plan is a SECONDARY outcome bar only, never a training reward.
sources.garrido_proposal_draft: What the v0 manuscript promised and this plan replaces (Deep Learning Algorithms framing, predictive-accuracy claim, Track-A action contract, DKA/KAN material). Cited only as superseded scope, never as delivered results.

amendment_3_garrido_source_attribution.manuscript_rule: Every claim of continuity with 'Garrido' in the paper must name the specific source; the alignment matrix is a required supplement artifact.
